sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_value VARCHAR, created_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_value, created_date) VALUES (1, '🦆', DATE '2023-10-01');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_value, created_date) VALUES (2, '', DATE '2023-09-01');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_value, created_date) VALUES (3, NULL, DATE '2023-08-01');
SELECT id, strlen(text_value) AS text_length, created_date + INTERVAL strlen(text_value) DAY AS new_date FROM test_table WHERE strlen(text_value) > 0;
SELECT id, text_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.created_date = test_table.created_date) AS date_count FROM test_table ORDER BY date_count DESC;
SELECT id, (text_value + ' extra') AS combined_text FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows, MAX(strlen(text_value)) AS max_length FROM test_table GROUP BY created_date HAVING max_length < 10;
SELECT id, MAX(text_value) AS max_text, created_date + INTERVAL (strlen(text_value) + 1) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id, created_date;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, text_value, created_date + INTERVAL 5 DAY AS adjusted_created_date FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.text_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN temp_table t2 ON t1.created_date = t2.adjusted_created_date WHERE strlen(t1.text_value) + 1 > 1;
